title: Create shooting events (PreShootEvent, PostShootEvent, GunRightClickEvent)

reference_files.reason: Shooting events - PreShootEvent (cancellable, before bullet creation), PostShootEvent (non-cancellable, after bullet registration), NeoForge EVENT_BUS
Right-click API - GunRightClickEvent (cancellable, only when no container GUI open), PlayerInteractEvent.RightClickItem/RightClickEmpty
Event parameter table - PreShootEvent carries player+gun, PostShootEvent carries player+gun+BulletRecord

acceptance_criteria: PreShootEvent class extends NeoForge PlayerEvent, carries Player and ItemStack gun, is cancellable (isCanceled/setCanceled)
PostShootEvent class extends NeoForge PlayerEvent, carries Player, ItemStack gun, and BulletRecord, is NOT cancellable
GunRightClickEvent class extends NeoForge PlayerEvent, carries Player and ItemStack gun, is cancellable
All events designed to be posted on NeoForge.EVENT_BUS (game bus)
All event classes follow NeoForge event conventions (constructor, getters, cancel fields)
PostShootEvent has getter for BulletRecord (may reference BulletRecord class from subtask 07 - use forward reference/stub if needed)
Code compiles without errors (BulletRecord reference may be a stub/forward declaration if 07 not yet complete)
